title: session — permissions
scope_suffix_convention: Session read permissions may carry scope suffixes (`.any`, `.tenant`, `.branch`, `.own` — sessions assigned to caller as coach, or attended by caller/their child). Writes always tenant-scoped. Coach-facing surface has narrower permissions than admin.

permissions.name: sessions.viewAny
permissions.description: List sessions. Admin/owner see all; coaches see .own (their assigned sessions); reception sees .branch (their branch).

permissions.name: sessions.view
permissions.description: Single-session read. Athletes + guardians see sessions where their athlete has attendance; coaches see their assigned sessions; admin sees all.

permissions.name: sessions.viewNotes
permissions.description: Read session_notes (coach's post-session narrative). NOT seeded on reception/athlete/guardian — notes are private-tier.

permissions.name: sessions.create
permissions.description: Consumes 1 session_slot per ISO calendar week of session.starts_at. Coaches can create their own sessions (private lessons, ad-hoc training).

permissions.name: sessions.update
permissions.description: Coaches can update sessions they're assigned to (curriculum, notes). Admin/owner update anything.

permissions.name: sessions.reschedule
permissions.description: Reschedule via new resource_booking_id. Fires SessionRescheduled (audit-warn) + cannot-opt-out notification.

permissions.name: sessions.cancel
permissions.description: Cancel a session. Fires SessionCancelled + cannot-opt-out notification.

permissions.name: sessions.cancel.short-notice
permissions.description: Admin+owner-only. Cancel a session < 24h before start. Requires the base sessions.cancel PLUS this permission.

permissions.name: sessions.assign_coach
permissions.description: Assign or reassign the head coach. Coaches cannot self-assign or reassign each other.

permissions.name: sessions.assign_coach.short-notice
permissions.description: Owner-only. Reassign head coach <24h before start. Fires SessionCoachReassigned with critical audit severity when minors registered.

permissions.name: sessions.confirm
permissions.description: Transition scheduled -> confirmed.

permissions.name: sessions.start
permissions.description: Manual start (bypasses the automated job at start-time).

permissions.name: sessions.delete
permissions.description: Soft-delete. Hard-delete via purge job.

permissions.name: sessions.attendance.record
permissions.description: Check-in / mark-absent / mark-late athletes. Coaches record for their assigned sessions.

permissions.name: sessions.attendance.remove
permissions.description: Remove an athlete from the attendance list (soft-delete the pivot). Coaches cannot — the attendance record is the safeguarding trail.

permissions.name: sessions.attendance.viewNotes
permissions.description: Read per-attendance notes (private-tier).

permissions.name: sessions.rate
permissions.description: Submit a rating on a session the athlete attended. Gated by session_coach_ratings entitlement.

permissions.name: sessions.safeguarding.flag
permissions.description: Set safeguarding_incident_flag=true. Requires session_notes to be filled. Fires SessionMinorSafeguardingIncident when minors registered — top-severity audit + regulator-facing.

permissions.name: sessions.safeguarding.view
permissions.description: Read safeguarding-flagged session details. NOT seeded on coach — coaches can FLAG but cannot READ across sessions (need-to-know).

permissions.name: sessions.manage
permissions.description: Umbrella permission.

permissions.name: platform.sessions.safeguarding.viewAny
permissions.description: Cross-tenant safeguarding-incident search. Restricted to platform safeguarding role — audit-critical.
